title: Directed staged growth under shape-guided 3D diffusion: code and connectivity-aware analysis
description: Code and derived data for a study of whether a frozen, pocket-conditioned 3D diffusion model (DiffSBDD) can preserve a local seven-heavy-atom warhead from ligand A while growing toward the three-dimensional shape of a distinct ligand B. Covers single-shot shape guidance, fixed staged growth, variable-increment greedy/beam search, and adaptive soft-scaffold search.
